posts._note: Talk about the problem. No link in first 3-5 lines. Make them feel the frustration. Then reveal the guide.
posts.linkedin:
You're posting consistently.

Same niche. Same effort. Maybe even better content than 6 months ago.

But your reach has been cut in half. Sometimes worse.

And the explanations you find online are maddening:

"The algorithm changed." Okay — but how?
"Post more Reels." You are.
"Use better hooks." You thought you were.

Here's what nobody tells you:

Instagram doesn't suppress content randomly. It reallocates attention toward content that sends the right signals — completion rate, saves, shares, session time.

If your reach is dropping, you're not sending those signals. Not because your content is bad. Because the structure isn't engineered to produce them.

The R.E.A.C.H. Content Mix System™ is a free guide from Publixion Intelligence that shows you exactly how to reverse this — using a structured 7-post weekly format that triggers every algorithmic signal simultaneously.

30 days. 30–150% reach increase. Free.

→ Download free: https://publixion.com/guides/instagram-reach-dropping

#InstagramReach #ContentStrategy #InstagramGrowth #CreatorTips #Publixion

posts._note: Show 1 key model or system inside the guide. Build authority. Teach something real.
posts.linkedin:
Instagram reach isn't random. It's a scoring system.

Here's how the R.E.A.C.H. Content Mix System™ works — and why it reverses declining reach in 30 days:

——

🔴 R — REELS FOR DISCOVERY
Reels are cold traffic. Every Reel is a potential entry point for someone who has never seen your account.

Structure: Hook (0–3s) → Pattern Break → Value → Loop Ending
Target: 40%+ completion rate, 70% avg watch time, 10+ shares per 1,000 views

Below 35% completion? Algorithm stops distributing to new audiences.

——

🟡 E — EDUCATIONAL CAROUSELS FOR AUTHORITY
Carousels earn saves. Saves are the single highest-weight algorithmic signal available to organic content.

8-slide structure: Bold Promise → Problem → Mistake 1 → Mistake 2 → Framework → Example → Action Step → Save CTA

Target: 3%+ saves-to-views ratio.

——

🟢 A — ACTIONABLE SAVES POSTS
Checklists, frameworks, templates, swipe files. Content people bookmark to reference again.

CTA that works every time: "Save this so you don't forget it."

——

🔵 C — COMMUNITY INTERACTION TRIGGERS
Polls, questions, hot takes. Drives comments — the loyalty signal. Keeps existing followers engaged.

——

🟣 H — HIGH-RETENTION OPTIMIZATION
Hook within 2 seconds. No long intro. Subtitles added. Loop ending. These aren't optional — they're the difference between 25% and 45% completion.

——

The 7-post weekly structure that runs all 5 signals:
Mon: Reel · Tue: Carousel · Wed: Reel · Thu: Save Post · Fri: Reel · Sat: Community · Sun: Carousel

This guide is completely free.

→ https://publixion.com/guides/instagram-reach-dropping

#InstagramReach #REACHFramework #ContentStrategy #InstagramGrowth #Publixion

posts.linkedin:
A lifestyle creator with 12,000 followers watched their reach drop 60% over 8 weeks.

Same niche. Same posting frequency. Just steadily less and less distribution.

Here's what happened when they implemented the R.E.A.C.H. Content Mix System™:

——

📅 WEEK 1 — Audit
Used the Root Cause Diagnostic in the guide. Identified the problem: 100% single-format content (static images only). No Reels. No save-focused posts. Completion rate: unmeasured.

📅 WEEK 2 — Deploy
Launched the 7-post weekly structure for the first time:
• 3 Reels using the Hook → Pattern Break → Value → Loop formula
• 2 Carousels using the 8-slide authority structure
• 1 Save post with checklist format + "Save this" CTA
• 1 Community poll

First Reel in the new format: 43% completion rate. Previous average: 22%.

📅 WEEK 3 — Optimize
Reels showing strongest performance: educational + opinion hooks. Doubled down. Added subtitles to all Reels — average completion jumped to 47%.

Save post from Week 2 was still generating saves 9 days after posting.

📅 WEEK 4 — Monetize
Added a clear bio CTA linking to a lead magnet. Three profile visitors from Reel comments converted to email subscribers in a single day.

📅 DAY 30 RESULTS:
• Reach: +120% vs baseline
• Saves: +300%
• Reels completion average: 45%
• 6 inbound DMs from potential clients

——

No paid promotion. No follower hack. Just the system — applied consistently for 30 days.

posts.facebook:
A fitness coach with 8,000 Instagram followers was experiencing reach dropping month over month. Their last 10 posts averaged 280 impressions. Six months earlier it had been 900+.

They implemented the R.E.A.C.H. Content Mix System™. Here's what happened:

Week 1: Ran the Root Cause Diagnostic. Finding: posting exclusively static images with no Reels, no save-optimized content, and no completion rate tracking. The algorithm had nothing to reward.

Week 2: Deployed full 7-post weekly structure. First Reel used the Hook → Pattern Break → Value → Loop structure. Hook: "The reason your fat loss stalled has nothing to do with your diet." Completion rate: 41%. Previous Reel average: 19%.

Week 3: Added "Save this" CTAs to every educational post. Saves went from an average of 3/post to 47/post on the carousel that week.

Week 4: Bio updated with clear CTA. First inbound DM from a Reel comment: "Been following you for 2 weeks. Can I book a consult?"

Day 30 results:
• Reach: +95%
• Saves: +280%
• Completion rate: 43% avg
• 4 new consultation bookings from Instagram alone

The system didn't change what they posted about. It changed how every post was structured, sequenced, and optimized.

Free download: https://publixion.com/guides/instagram-reach-dropping

posts.linkedin:
"I'm tempted to download the R.E.A.C.H. guide — but I have a few doubts."

Let me handle them:

——

❓ "It's free — what's the catch?"

No catch. No hidden upsell on the download page. No email required. Publixion publishes free guides to demonstrate the quality of our systems — the value is the content itself.

——

❓ "I've tried Instagram growth advice before. None of it worked."

Most Instagram advice is isolated tactics without structural context. "Use better hooks" doesn't tell you where hooks fit in a complete weekly system. The R.E.A.C.H. framework gives you the full architecture — 5 content roles, 7-post weekly schedule, completion rate targets — not just individual tips.

——

❓ "I don't have time to post 7 times a week."

The 7-post structure includes repurposing logic — one Reel idea generates 3 posts. The guide includes a content repurposing system: 1 Q&A → 3 Reels + 1 newsletter section + 1 carousel. You create less, distribute more.

——

❓ "My niche is too small / saturated for this to work."

The R.E.A.C.H. system works on algorithmic mechanics, not niche size. Saves and completion rates signal value regardless of what you post about. A niche audience that saves and rewatches your content gets amplified just as strongly as a broad one.

——

❓ "Will this help me actually make money — or just get more views?"

Section 9 of the guide is the Monetization Layer: Discovery → Authority → Trust → Offer. The system converts reach into leads. 1,000 reach → 50 profile visits → 10 DMs → 2 clients. The math is inside.

——

It's free. The only question is whether you implement it.

→ https://publixion.com/guides/instagram-reach-dropping
